expectations.text: Recommends compound movement patterns (squat, press, hinge, row variants)
expectations.evidence: Lists 'Squat, deadlift or Romanian deadlift, bench press, barbell rows, pull-ups, overhead press.'

expectations.text: Provides a starting volume recommendation (approximately 8-12 sets per muscle per week)
expectations.evidence: Table shows 8-16 sets per muscle group per week; within range of 8-12 for most groups.

expectations.text: Recommends training mostly in the 5-12 rep range
expectations.evidence: States '6-15 reps per set' for hypertrophy and '1-6 reps per set' for strength.

expectations.text: Addresses proximity to failure (most work at 0-2 RIR or close to failure)
expectations.evidence: States '0-3 reps in reserve (RIR) on most sets.'

expectations.text: Provides nutrition guidance: slow gain target and protein target
expectations.evidence: Protein 1.6-2.2g/kg, calorie target 17kcal/lb. Mentions weight tracking but doesn't specify 1% BW/month.
Describes a 4-day upper/lower split. Within 3-5 range.

expectations.text: Mentions importance of bodyweight/movement competency before heavy barbell loading
expectations.evidence: Does not mention bodyweight proficiency or calisthenics before barbell work. Goes straight to compound barbell movements.
